Within this family, Taraxacum wibergense is part of the tribe Cichorieae, which includes various thistle and dandelion species. This species is further classified as a member of the genus Taraxacum, which is a group of plants commonly known as dandelions. Taraxacum wibergense is a relatively rare species found in Sweden and other parts of northern Europe.
